cleavage agent: 20 µg of protein was prepared for LC-MS/MS analysis as previously described
fractionation method: concurrent RP-HPLC and LC-MS identified a singly charged, putative siderophore
fragmentation method: 20 µg of protein was prepared for LC-MS/MS analysis
instrument: analyzed by a Thermo Fisher Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: suspended in RLT buffer (supplemented with 1% β-Mercaptoethanol)
